name: Multi-Infrastructure Attack
description: Simultaneous loss of Estlink 2 and Estlink 1. Modeled after Jan 2026 simultaneous trip (both Estlinks lost).

expected_impacts.EE: Total loss of Finland import capacity (1008 MW). Severe N-1 violation. Relies entirely on Latvia south link.
expected_impacts.LV: Increased burden as sole electricity supplier to Estonia from south.
expected_impacts.LT: Indirect — may need to increase NordBalt and LitPol imports to compensate regional deficit.

historical_reference: 2026-01-20 Kiisa battery testing fault tripped both Estlinks. ~1000 MW lost. LitPol operated at double rated capacity.
